Hi, I'm Andrew Kee

I am undergraduate student pursuing my M.S./B.S. in Electrical and Computer Engineering with a focus in RF, Power, and Control Systems at the University of Colorado at Boulder.

Aside from Engineering, I also love the outdoors. I cycle, ski, hike, play table tennis, and ride my unicorn. Additionally, I enjoy photography and creating digital artwork.

At CU Boulder, I founded and am currently the president of the CU Boulder Table Tennis Club. Our team has only been around for a year, and we have competed nationally against top schools. If you want to read more about table tennis, head over to the Extras section.

I am currently working as a intern at the FirstRF Corporation. At FirstRF, I am working on developing a test board for the AM335x processor as well as assisting in the development of an RF Power Meter.
